member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CalibrationEngine
member.summary: Engine responsible for calculating intrinsic camera parameters using a physical checkerboard. Essential for establishing a mathematically sound relationship between curved pixels and reality.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CalibrationEngine.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.param: Number of inner corners horizontally (squares X - 1)
Number of inner corners vertically (squares Y - 1)
Exact physical size of a square in millimeters

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CalibrationEngine.Calibrate(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{Emgu.CV.Mat})
member.summary: Computes the complex camera matrix and geometry mapping out of diverse checkerboard images. Needs at least 5 frames with varied angles (some close, some far, tilted, rotated).
member.param: A set of raw BGR capture frames containing the chessboard.
member.returns: A rigid mathematical camera mapping model, or null if it fails.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics
member.summary: Holds the intrinsic camera parameters required to correct lens distortion and map 2D image coordinates to 3D rays. Includes the generated Camera Matrix and Lens Distortion Coefficients.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.CameraMatrix
member.summary: The 3x3 camera matrix (fx, fy, cx, cy) mapping focal lengths and principal points.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.DistortionCoefficients
member.summary: The distortion coefficients describing geometric lens distortion (k1, k2, p1, p2, k3).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.ImageWidth
member.summary: Width of the image sensor pixel array used to calculate this.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.ImageHeight
member.summary: Height of the image sensor pixel array used to calculate this.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.#ctor(Emgu.CV.Mat,Emgu.CV.Mat,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new intrinsic mapping model.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.GenerateRectificationMaps(Emgu.CV.Mat@,Emgu.CV.Mat@)
member.summary: Calculates and caches the maps needed to unwarp frames in real-time.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged matrices.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.UndistortionFilter
member.summary:
Automatically corrects both Barrel and Pincushion lens distortion in real-time. Uses pre-calculated rectification maps mapping 2D curved pixels back to pure Euclidean planes for scientifically-valid spatial measurements.
MUST be added to the VideoPipeline BEFORE any Tracking engines run.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Calibration.UndistortionFilter.#ctor(HumTrack.Core.Calibration.CameraIntrinsics)
member.summary: Creates the filter utilizing pre-calculated mathematical constants from calibration.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger
member.summary: Centralized logging service for HumTrack. Writes structured logs to both console and rolling log files. All tracking engine errors, calibration events, and performance metrics are routed through this service for debugging and audit trails.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger.Log
member.summary: Gets the configured Serilog logger instance. Auto-initializes with defaults if not explicitly configured.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger.Initialize(System.String,System.Nullable{Serilog.Events.LogEventLevel})
member.summary: Initialize the logging system with file + console sinks. Call once at application startup.
member.param: Directory for log files. Defaults to "logs" in the working directory.
Minimum severity to log. Default: Debug in debug builds, Information in release.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger.ForContext``1
member.summary: Creates a logger for a specific source context (class/module name). Use this in each class to tag log entries with their origin.
member.returns: A logger tagged with the class name.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger.ForEngine(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a logger for a tracking engine by name.
member.param: The engine's display name.
member.returns: A logger tagged with the engine name.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.HumTrackLogger.Shutdown
member.summary: Flushes all buffered log entries and releases resources. Call at application shutdown.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor
member.summary: Performance metrics tracker for tracking engine operations. Logs per-frame timing, markers-per-second, and drift warnings.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the performance monitor for a specific engine.
member.param: Display name of the tracking engine.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor.BeginFrame
member.summary: Call before processing each frame.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor.EndFrame(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Call after processing each frame. Logs timing and detects slowdowns.
member.param: Number of markers successfully tracked this frame.
Total number of markers being tracked.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor.TotalFrames
member.summary: Gets the total number of frames processed.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Diagnostics.PerformanceMonitor.TotalMarkersLost
member.summary: Gets the total number of marker-loss events.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for tracking engines. Each engine reads only the properties it cares about and ignores the rest.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.MarkerType
member.summary: The type of physical marker being tracked. Determines optimal detection strategy.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.ConfidenceThreshold
member.summary: Confidence threshold below which a marker is considered "lost". Range: 0.0 to 1.0. Default: 0.6.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.SearchWindow
member.summary: Size of the search window around the predicted position (pixels). Used by TemplateMatchingEngine and as fallback search area.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.TemplateEvolveRate
member.summary: Rate at which the template evolves to match appearance changes. 0.0 = never update template, 1.0 = fully replace each frame.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.PyramidLevels
member.summary: Number of pyramid levels for pyramidal Lucas-Kanade. More levels handle larger frame-to-frame motion. Default: 3.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.LkWindowSize
member.summary: Size of the search window at each pyramid level. Default: 21x21 pixels.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.BrightnessThreshold
member.summary: Brightness threshold for retroreflective marker detection. Pixels above this value are candidate markers. Range: 0–255.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.ColorRange
member.summary: HSV color range for colored sticker detection. Null when using brightness-only (retroreflective) mode.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.MinMarkerArea
member.summary: Minimum marker area in pixels². Blobs smaller than this are rejected.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.MaxMarkerArea
member.summary: Maximum marker area in pixels². Blobs larger than this are rejected.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.MinCircularity
member.summary: Minimum circularity (0.0–1.0) for blob shape filtering. 1.0 = perfect circle. Default: 0.5.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.ArucoDictionary
member.summary: ArUco dictionary type (e.g., 4x4_50, 5x5_100, 6x6_250). Determines which pattern set the detector recognizes.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings.RedetectIntervalFrames
member.summary: Number of frames between full re-detection passes in the Hybrid engine. Lower values reduce drift but cost more CPU. Default: 30.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType
member.summary: Supported ArUco dictionary types matching OpenCV's predefined dictionaries.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType.Dict4X4With50
member.summary: 4×4 bit markers, 50 unique IDs. Smallest, fastest detection.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType.Dict4X4With100
member.summary: 4×4 bit markers, 100 unique IDs.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType.Dict5X5With100
member.summary: 5×5 bit markers, 100 unique IDs. Good balance.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType.Dict5X5With250
member.summary: 5×5 bit markers, 250 unique IDs.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ArucoDictionaryType.Dict6X6With250
member.summary: 6×6 bit markers, 250 unique IDs. Most robust, largest markers.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.ArucoDetectionEngine
member.summary:
ArUco fiducial marker detection engine. Detects printed ArUco/AprilTag markers with unique IDs — no templates needed.
Best for: Printed paper markers glued to the body. Each marker has a unique binary code, so identity is maintained automatically even during occlusion.
Key advantage: Zero marker swap confusion — impossible to mix up left/right knee during gait crossover because each marker has a unique ID.
Deterministic: Yes — pattern detection is a pure binary classification.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.BlobDetectionEngine
member.summary:
Blob detection engine for physical markers (retroreflective tape or colored stickers). Detects ALL markers in a single frame pass — no templates or ROIs needed.
Modes:
• Brightness mode (retroreflective): threshold grayscale → find contours
• Color mode (stickers): HSV threshold → find contours
Marker identity: Maintained by nearest-neighbor association across frames. For more robust identity, use colored stickers (color = ID) or ArUco markers.
Deterministic: Yes — thresholding and contour detection are purely deterministic.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.CsrtEngine
member.summary:
CSRT-inspired (Channel and Spatial Reliability) tracking engine. Uses multi-channel template matching with spatial weighting for improved robustness to partial occlusion and background clutter.
Best for: Markers that get partially occluded (limb crossover in gait).
Deterministic: Yes — all operations are pure arithmetic.
This implementation uses multi-channel (BGR separate) correlation to approximate CSRT's channel reliability weighting. Each channel is matched independently and fused via weighted averaging.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.HybridEngine
member.summary:
Hybrid tracking engine — combines Blob Detection for initial marker discovery and periodic re-detection with Optical Flow for fast frame-to-frame tracking.
Strategy:
Frame 0: Blob detection finds all markers.
Frames 1..N-1: Optical flow tracks all markers in one call.
Frame N: Blob detection re-detects all markers to correct drift.
Repeat.
Best for: Retroreflective tape markers in gait analysis. Recommended default engine.
Deterministic: Yes — both sub-engines are deterministic.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.KcfEngine
member.summary:
KCF (Kernelized Correlation Filter) tracking engine. Implemented using OpenCV's correlation-based approach via frequency-domain operations.
Best for: Single high-contrast markers, natural features.
Speed: Very fast — FFT-based correlation.
Deterministic: Yes — uses deterministic FFT convolution.
This is a lightweight implementation that uses template matching with a cosine-window spatial mask to approximate KCF filter behavior without requiring the contrib tracker module.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.OpticalFlowEngine
member.summary:
Lucas-Kanade pyramidal sparse optical flow tracking engine. Tracks ALL markers simultaneously in a single OpenCV call.
Best for: Multi-point gait analysis with retroreflective or sticker markers.
Key advantage: O(1) calls regardless of marker count — all points tracked at once.
Deterministic: Yes — pyramidal LK uses fixed-point gradient computation.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.Engines.TemplateMatchingEngine
member.summary:
Normalized cross-correlation (NCC) template matching engine. Slides a template image across a search window to find the best match.
Compatible with: Legacy Tracker behavior.
Best for: Natural features, any marker when no better engine is available.
Deterministic: Yes — NCC is a pure arithmetic operation.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange
member.summary: Defines an HSV color range for color-based marker detection. Used by with colored sticker markers.
member.param: Lower bound of Hue channel (0–180 in OpenCV convention).
Upper bound of Hue channel.
Lower bound of Saturation (0–255).
Upper bound of Saturation.
Lower bound of Value/brightness (0–255).
Upper bound of Value/brightness.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Defines an HSV color range for color-based marker detection. Used by with colored sticker markers.
member.param: Lower bound of Hue channel (0–180 in OpenCV convention).
Upper bound of Hue channel.
Lower bound of Saturation (0–255).
Upper bound of Saturation.
Lower bound of Value/brightness (0–255).
Upper bound of Value/brightness.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.HueLow
member.summary: Lower bound of Hue channel (0–180 in OpenCV convention).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.HueHigh
member.summary: Upper bound of Hue channel.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.SaturationLow
member.summary: Lower bound of Saturation (0–255).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.SaturationHigh
member.summary: Upper bound of Saturation.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.ValueLow
member.summary: Lower bound of Value/brightness (0–255).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.ValueHigh
member.summary: Upper bound of Value/brightness.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.Red
member.summary: Predefined range for red markers (wraps around H=0/180).

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.Green
member.summary: Predefined range for green markers.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.Blue
member.summary: Predefined range for blue markers.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.HsvRange.Yellow
member.summary: Predefined range for yellow markers.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine
member.summary:
Common interface for all tracking engines in HumTrack. Implements the Strategy pattern: the application selects an engine at runtime and all downstream pipelines (physics, export, UI) consume identically regardless of which engine produced it.
Contract: Every implementation must be fully deterministic — identical inputs must always produce byte-identical outputs.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Name
member.summary: Display name shown in the UI engine dropdown (e.g., "Optical Flow (Lucas-Kanade)").

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Description
member.summary: Short human-readable description for tooltips.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Capabilities
member.summary: Declares what this engine can and cannot do. Used by the UI to show/hide relevant settings.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Initialize(Emgu.CV.Mat,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.Drawing.RectangleF},HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings)
member.summary: Initialize the engine for tracking on a reference frame. Called once when the user defines key frames or initial marker positions.
member.param: The video frame (BGR, 8-bit) on which markers are first defined.
List of initial marker bounding rectangles in image coordinates. For template-free engines (ArUco, Blob), this may be empty — the engine will auto-detect markers in the reference frame.
Engine-specific configuration. Each engine reads only its relevant properties.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Track(Emgu.CV.Mat)
member.summary: Track all initialized markers in the given frame. Returns one per marker.
member.param: The current video frame (BGR, 8-bit).
member.returns: Array of results, one per marker. Results with IsFound = false indicate a lost marker. The array length must equal the number of initialized markers (or the number of auto-detected markers for template-free engines).

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Reinitialize(Emgu.CV.Mat,System.Int32,System.Drawing.RectangleF)
member.summary: Attempt to re-detect a specific marker that was lost. Called by the pipeline when a marker's confidence drops below threshold.
member.param: The current frame.
Index of the lost marker.
Region to search within (may be larger than the original ROI).
member.returns: True if the marker was successfully re-acquired.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.ITrackingEngine.Detect(Emgu.CV.Mat,HumTrack.Core.Tracking.EngineSettings)
member.summary: Auto-detect all markers in a frame without prior initialization. Only supported by engines with .
member.param: The frame to scan.
Detection settings (brightness threshold, color range, ArUco dictionary).
member.returns: Detected markers with positions and optional IDs. Returns an empty array if no markers are found.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType
member.summary: Defines the type of physical marker being tracked. Determines which detection strategy is optimal.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType.NaturalFeature
member.summary: No physical marker — tracking a natural visual feature via template/ROI.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType.Retroreflective
member.summary: Retroreflective tape marker — detected by brightness thresholding.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType.ColoredSticker
member.summary: Colored sticker marker — detected by HSV color thresholding.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType.ArUco
member.summary: Printed ArUco/AprilTag fiducial marker — detected by pattern recognition.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities
member.summary: Defines the capabilities of a tracking engine. Used to determine UI options and pipeline compatibility.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.None
member.summary: No specific capabilities.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.SinglePoint
member.summary: Can track a single point per instance.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.MultiPoint
member.summary: Can track multiple points simultaneously in a single call.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.ScaleInvariant
member.summary: Handles changes in marker apparent size.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.RotationInvariant
member.summary: Handles marker rotation.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.OcclusionRobust
member.summary: Robust to partial marker occlusion.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.SubPixelAccuracy
member.summary: Returns positions with sub-pixel precision.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.ColorBased
member.summary: Uses color information for detection.

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.SelfIdentifying
member.summary: Each marker is uniquely identified by its pattern (e.g., ArUco).

member.name: F:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingCapabilities.TemplateFreee
member.summary: No template or ROI definition needed — detects markers by physical properties.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingEngineRegistry
member.summary: Central registry of all available tracking engines. The UI queries this to populate the engine selection dropdown. Engines are registered in priority order (recommended engines first).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingEngineRegistry.AvailableEngines
member.summary: Gets the display names of all available engines, in recommended order.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingEngineRegistry.Create(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the tracking engine with the given display name.
member.param: The display name (must match ).
member.returns: A new engine instance. Caller is responsible for disposal.
member.exception: Thrown if no engine matches the given name.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingEngineRegistry.CreateForMarkerType(HumTrack.Core.Tracking.MarkerType)
member.summary: Returns the recommended engine for the given marker type.
member.param: The physical marker type being used.
member.returns: A new engine instance optimized for the marker type.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult
member.summary: Result of tracking a single marker in one frame. Immutable record — all physics and data pipelines consume this directly.
member.param: Zero-based index of the marker in the track's marker list.
Sub-pixel center position in image coordinates (pixels).
Tracking confidence, 0.0 (lost) to 1.0 (perfect match).
False if the marker was not detected in this frame.
Updated bounding rectangle around the marker.
Optional unique marker identifier (e.g., ArUco ID). Null for engines that do not provide self-identification.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Single,System.Boolean,System.Drawing.RectangleF,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Result of tracking a single marker in one frame. Immutable record — all physics and data pipelines consume this directly.
member.param: Zero-based index of the marker in the track's marker list.
Sub-pixel center position in image coordinates (pixels).
Tracking confidence, 0.0 (lost) to 1.0 (perfect match).
False if the marker was not detected in this frame.
Updated bounding rectangle around the marker.
Optional unique marker identifier (e.g., ArUco ID). Null for engines that do not provide self-identification.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.MarkerIndex
member.summary: Zero-based index of the marker in the track's marker list.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.Position
member.summary: Sub-pixel center position in image coordinates (pixels).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.Confidence
member.summary: Tracking confidence, 0.0 (lost) to 1.0 (perfect match).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.IsFound
member.summary: False if the marker was not detected in this frame.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.BoundingBox
member.summary: Updated bounding rectangle around the marker.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.Tracking.TrackingResult.MarkerId
member.summary: Optional unique marker identifier (e.g., ArUco ID). Null for engines that do not provide self-identification.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.ContrastEnhancementFilter
member.summary: Applies Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization (CLAHE) on the luminance channel. Substantially improves tracking in poorly-lit or highly variable lighting environments without destroying the color data (which Blob/HSV tracking needs).

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.ContrastEnhancementFilter.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.param: Higher values = more contrast. (Usually 2 to 4)
Tile size for adaptive histogram (usually 8x8)

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.SharpeningFilter
member.summary: Applies an unsharp mask to mitigate minor motion blur. Uses a safe two-pass approach: blur → subtract → blend. Useful for fast-moving subjects on lower-framerate cameras.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.SharpeningFilter.BlurSigma
member.summary: Sigma for the Gaussian blur step (higher = stronger sharpening effect).

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.SharpeningFilter.Intensity
member.summary: How much sharpening to blend in (0=none, 1=full, 1.5=aggressive).

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.Filters.SharpeningFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new sharpening filter using an unsharp mask approximation.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor
member.summary: Represents a stage in the video processing pipeline that modifies a frame in-place. Allows modular, pluggable filters to be applied dynamically before tracking.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor.Name
member.summary: Display name of the processor for UI selection.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor.IsEnabled
member.summary: Whether this filter should be actively applied to frames.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor.Process(Emgu.CV.Mat)
member.summary: Processes and modifies the given frame in-place.
member.param: The BGR frame to be modified.

member.name: T:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline
member.summary: A modular processing pipeline that executes multiple frame processors sequentially. Used to chain together lens undistortion, motion blur Sharpening, contrast adjustment, etc.

member.name: P:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline.Processors
member.summary: Gets the ordered list of currently active processors.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline.AddProcessor(HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor)
member.summary: Adds a processor to the end of the pipeline.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline.RemoveProcessor(HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.IFrameProcessor)
member.summary: Removes a specific processor from the pipeline.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline.Clear
member.summary: Clears and disposes all processors.

member.name: M:HumTrack.Core.VideoProcessing.VideoPipeline.Process(Emgu.CV.Mat)
member.summary: Passes the frame through all enabled processors sequentially. Frame is modified in-place to minimize allocations.
member.param: The unmanaged EmguCV Mat frame.
